<div align="center">
<h1>RenderCV Skills</h1>

_AI agent skill for [RenderCV](https://github.com/rendercv/rendercv)_

</div>

This repository contains the distributable AI agent skill for [RenderCV](https://github.com/rendercv/rendercv). It teaches AI coding assistants how to create, edit, and render professional CVs using RenderCV.

## Install

```bash
npx skills add rendercv/rendercv-skills
```

Works with Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, and 20+ other agents.

## Auto-Generated

This repository is **automatically generated** from the main [rendercv/rendercv](https://github.com/rendercv/rendercv) repository. The skill content is derived from RenderCV's source code, Pydantic models, and documentation.

**Do not open issues or pull requests here.** All contributions should go to the main repository: [rendercv/rendercv](https://github.com/rendercv/rendercv).
